name: Improve scientific rigor and integrity across codebase and final paper

description: Baseline scientific audit: 6 rigor/integrity issues found across the final LaTeX paper and GSM8K evaluation script; established a reproducible audit metric for further iterations.

Hardened held-out GSM8K evaluation for rigor and reproducibility (greedy deterministic defaults, seed control, strict answer extraction, actual checkpoint_path loading, prompt-free decoding) and softened paper/report wording to avoid overclaiming training-set GSM8K results.
